articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Eyewitnesses have described the moment Air Canada flight AC8646 crashed into a fire truck on the runway of New York's LaGuardia airport.
articles.title: 'Like the plane got cut in half': Eyewitnesses describe chaos of LaGuardia crash

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Evidence in the trial of Stephen McCullagh outlined a cold, calculating plan to kill Natalie McNally and get away with it.
articles.title: Stephen McCullagh: The undoing of  YouTuber's 'live stream' murder alibi

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Meloni vowed to press on after losing a vote on constitutional reform many turned into a referendum on her government.
articles.title: Referendum defeat leaves Italy's Meloni looking more vulnerable

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The health firm backed by actor Idris Elba and broadcaster Jonathan Ross is being bought by Danone, reportedly for €1bn (£860m).
articles.title: Danone buys meal supplement maker Huel

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Until further notice, motorists in Slovenia will be restricted to a maximum purchase of 50 litres of fuel per day.
articles.title: Slovenia becomes first EU state to introduce fuel rationing

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: The government is looking at ways to make much-delayed London to Birmingham railway line cheaper to deliver.
articles.title: HS2 train speeds could be cut to save money

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Tomos is one of thousands with ME in Wales, with services described as “a desert” for those most affected.
articles.title: ME: Swansea man was active but now he can't walk or talk at 28

articles.description: Police say they are looking for three suspects after the Hatzola ambulances were set on fire.
articles.title: Arson attack on Jewish charity ambulances being investigated by counter-terror police

articles.author: BBC News
articles.description: Moma Foods says a third-party facility found "a mouse contamination event" last autumn.
articles.title: Moma Foods recalls porridge months after mouse contamination

articles.description: Leo Radvinsky became a billionaire after investing in the site, known for its pornographic content.
articles.title: OnlyFans owner Leonid Radvinsky dies at 43
